## Before you open this issue

Thanks for trying Start Here. Quick read before you file:

This is a personal template, maintained as time allows. Bug fixes are welcome and will get attention when I can. Feature requests are likely to be declined — the page is small on purpose, and growing it defeats its point. If you need feature parity with a full productivity app, fork the repo and customize it for yourself. The MIT license permits it.

**What I'll likely do:**

- Bug reports with browser, OS, and steps to reproduce → triaged
- PRs that fix bugs without expanding scope → reviewed
- Documentation improvements → reviewed

**What I'll likely decline:**

- New features (drag-to-reorder rules, more sections, theme switching, export/import, sync, accounts, etc.)
- Mobile drag-and-drop support — known limitation, see README
- Anything that requires a build step or external dependency

**What you can do instead:**

- Fork the repo and customize for yourself — the MIT license permits everything
- Open a Discussion rather than an Issue if you want to talk through an idea before filing
